subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.25
question_html:
Which structure represents a repeating unit of a polymer formed from propene?

A.  –CH2–CH(CH3)–

B.  –CH2–CH2–CH2–

C.  –CH(CH3)–CH(CH3)–

D.  –CH2–CH2–
examiners_html: 44% of the candidates identified the repeating unit of the polymer formed from propene. The most commonly chosen distractor was a straight chain.
